texto: What I want to impart through our correspondence is that no matter what anyone may be going through, here's the thing: If you love each other, and if your relationship is worth the pain or the hardship, stay with it. The extraordinary treasure of sharing another person's life is one of the most gratifying experiences of being a human being.
explicacao: Citação de Lorri Davis sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “What I want to impart through our correspondence is that no matter what anyone may be going throu…” articula autoestima, experience, hardship em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como hardship e love.
